subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of Destiny. Verily, My Afnán, upon him be My glory... whenever he approacheth with spirit and sweet fragrance, and turneth with wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر علیک بهاء الله مالک القدر ان افنانی علیه بهائی... هر هنگام بروح و ریحان وافع شود و بحکمت موافق توجه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @wisdom [hikmat]
